coin_profile.name: The Graph
coin_profile.description: The Graph is a decentralised indexing protocol for blockchain data — often described as 'Google for blockchains'. Developers use it to query on-chain data efficiently. GRT is used to pay indexers and curators who maintain and organise the data.
